title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Sanji, Nami, Usopp. Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Stop crying. It's your own fault.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You're really starting to tick me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: The choice is the cap- tain's alone.

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: I guess, he'll choose me after all.

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: Must... stay calm and... be... cool...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy Pirate
dialogue.text: Let's see who he will choose?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We will certainly get an easy win.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Boss, don't be sad. We want you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah! We're looking forward to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Yes, this is where I belong...

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: Stop that bull shit. Fight already

summary: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
